message:
feat(math): expand f32 function coverage with hyperbolic, special, decomposition, and rounding functions

Add comprehensive f32 math bindings via libm to achieve near-complete
POSIX math.h coverage for the float32 surface:

Hyperbolic functions:
- sinhf, coshf, tanhf, asinhf, acoshf, atanhf

Additional exponential/logarithmic:
- exp2f, expm1f, log1pf

Float utilities and rounding:
- rintf, nearbyintf, remainderf, copysignf, cbrtf, hypotf

Min/max/dim/fma:
- fminf, fmaxf, fdimf, fmaf (NaN-propagation-safe)

Integer rounding conversions:
- lrintf, llrintf, lroundf, llroundf

Float decomposition:
- ldexpf, frexpf, modff

Scaling and exponent extraction:
- scalbnf, scalblnf (with i64->i32 clamping), nextafterf, ilogbf, logbf
  (with manual special-case handling for 0/inf/NaN)

Special functions:
- erff, erfcf, lgammaf, tgammaf

Add tests for every new function group with sanity-check assertions.
Update mod.rs to re-export all new symbols.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
